Bash(cd C:/Users/LENOVO/Desktop/trade2.0 && python -c "
import subprocess, sys, time
from pathlib import Path

DOWNLOADER = Path\('src_v2/data/dukascopy_downloader.py'\)
RAW_DIR = Path\('data/raw'\)

sub_chunks = [
    \('2023-07-01', '2023-08-24'\),
    \('2023-08-25', '2023-10-18'\),
    \('2023-10-19', '2023-12-12'\),
    \('2023-12-13', '2024-02-05'\),
    \('2024-02-06', '2024-04-01'\),
    \('2024-04-02', '2024-05-26'\),
    \('2024-05-27', '2024-07-20'\),
    \('2024-07-21', '2024-09-13'\),
    \('2024-09-14', '2024-11-07'\),
    \('2024-11-08', '2024-12-31'\),
]

for start, end in sub_chunks:
    s = start.replace\('-', ''\)
    e = end.replace\('-', ''\)
    out = RAW_DIR / f'XAUUSD_5M_chunk_{s}_{e}.csv'
    log = RAW_DIR / f'log_{start[:7]}_{end[:7]}.txt'
    print\(f'[start] {start} -> {end}'\)
    sys.stdout.flush\(\)
    with open\(log, 'w'\) as lf:
        r = subprocess.run\(
            [sys.executable, str\(DOWNLOADER\), '--start', start, '--end', end, '--workers', '80', '--out', str\(out\)],
            stdout=lf, stderr=lf
        \)
    bars = 0
    if out.exists\(\):
        import pandas as pd
        df = pd.read_csv\(out, index_col=0\)
        bars = len\(df\)
    print\(f'[done]  {start} -> {end}  bars={bars}  rc={r.returncode}'\)
    sys.stdout.flush\(\)
print\('[all done]'\)
")
